markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: At least 95,000 albums
markets.rules_primary: If The Romantic by Bruno Mars by's sales, on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart for March 06, 2026, are At Least 95000, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This event will specifically encompass the number listed under the Albums column on the Hits Daily Double’s Top 50 chart for the relevant week.
